mapper.select:
SELECT d.*, c.category_name FROM dish d LEFT JOIN category c ON d.category_id = c.category_id
AND d.dish_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND d.category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY d.dish_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dish(dish_name, price, stock, image, description, category_id, available) VALUES(#{dishName}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{image}, #{description}, #{categoryId}, #{available})
mapper.update: UPDATE dish SET stock = stock - #{quantity} WHERE dish_id = #{dishId} AND stock >= #{quantity}
UPDATE dish SET stock = stock + #{quantity} WHERE dish_id = #{dishId}
mapper.select: SELECT d.*, c.category_name FROM dish d LEFT JOIN category c ON d.category_id = c.category_id WHERE d.stock <= #{threshold} ORDER BY d.stock ASC
